extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won bunch sprint after INEOS used 2nd intermediate sprint at 12km to steal time bonifications, advancing THOMAS into top-5.
tactical_patterns: INEOS weaponized second intermediate sprint inside 12km with dedicated ROW leadout to gain time bonifications mid-stage.
BISSEGER attacked final climb at 35km then repeatedly solo despite break still intact showing UAE sprint setup weakness.
BikeExchange committed chaser pre-12km mark while teams with GC ambitions ignored breakaway entirely revealing strategic priorities.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: moved into top-5 GC by contesting intermediate sprint bonus seconds, suggesting INEOS split resource allocation
rider_signals.BISSEGER Stefan: neutral: attempted solo attacks from breakaway with 35km remaining but UAE chased down their own rider
rider_signals.SHACHMAN Mattia: negative: caught in crash outside 3km safe zone and dropped from 2nd GC to outside top-10
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: first World Tour win in over year ending nine-month drought suggests form peaking pre-Tour
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: Bahrain held yellow through messy finale while INEOS took aggressive intermediate sprint approach
